description: Event handler for weapon jamming mechanics. Tracks accumulated fail chance and jammed state across turns.

0x10.name: skill
0x10.description: Reference to the parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x18.name: jammingConfig
0x18.description: Reference to the Jamming configuration ScriptableObject

0x20.name: accumulatedFailChance
0x20.description: Current accumulated fail chance (increases each use by FailChancePerUse)

0x24.name: jammedOnTurn
0x24.description: Turn number when weapon jammed. Set to -100 (0xFFFFFF9C) when not jammed

0x58.name: baseFailChance
0x58.description: Base fail chance percentage at start of each round. Copied to handler.accumulatedFailChance on round start

0x5c.name: failChancePerUse
0x5c.description: Additional fail chance added per weapon use. Accumulated in handler.accumulatedFailChance

0x60.name: jammingSound
0x60.description: Audio clip played when weapon jams. Used with Stem_ID.Play3D() for positional audio

functions.name: .ctor
functions.description: Constructor. Initializes jammedOnTurn to -100 (not jammed) and stores jammingConfig reference

functions.name: GetAverageUsesPerTurn
functions.description: Calculates expected uses per turn using probability formula: product of (baseChance + turns*failPerUse) * scaleFactor

functions.name: GetFailChance
functions.description: Returns current fail chance as float percentage from accumulatedFailChance

functions.name: IsJammed
functions.description: Returns true if currentTurn - jammedOnTurn < 2 (jammed this turn or last)

functions.name: IsUsable
functions.description: Returns true if currentTurn - jammedOnTurn > 1 (can use after 2 turns)

functions.name: OnBeforeUse_CheckJam
functions.description: Core jam check. Adds failChancePerUse to accumulated chance, rolls random check. If jammed: stores turn, plays sound, shows UI text

functions.name: OnRoundStart
functions.description: Resets accumulatedFailChance to baseFailChance from config

functions.name: OnTurnStart
functions.description: If jammed, plays jam sound and shows 'Jammed' UI text reminder

functions.name: PlayJamSound
functions.description: Plays jammingSound (config+0x60) as 3D positional audio at actor location

key_discoveries.finding: Jamming uses an accumulating probability system. Base chance resets each round, then increases by failChancePerUse with each weapon use
When jammed, weapon is unusable for 2 turns (current turn comparison uses < 2 for IsJammed, > 1 for IsUsable)
Current turn is retrieved from TacticalManager singleton at offset 0x60. JammedOnTurn set to -100 when not jammed
JammingSound at config+0x60 is a Stem_ID structure, played via Stem_ID.Play3D() for spatial audio at actor position
When jammed, shows 'Jammed' text via UnitHUD.ShowDropDownText() using StringLiteral_8673 and UIConfig color at 0x588
Uses Menace.Tools.PseudoRandom.NextPercent() from TacticalManager for deterministic jam rolls
JammingHandler extends SkillEventHandler, inheriting skill reference at 0x10 and GetActor/GetOwner methods

TacticalManager.offset_0x60: int currentTurn - Current turn number in tactical combat

BaseSkill.offset_0xa8: int uses - Current number of uses
BaseSkill.offset_0xac: int maxUses - Maximum number of uses

UIConfig.offset_0x588: Color jammedTextColor - Color used for 'Jammed' dropdown text
